original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of numerous small fragments and several larger, distinct objects arranged on a light-colored, flat surface. The fragments appear to be of metallic or composite material, some with dark, possibly burnt or coated surfaces. In the upper row, from left to right: a dark, circular disc object with a central hub; a dark, cylindrical object with wires extending from it; a dark, rectangular component with wires and what appears to be a connector; a broken, curved, ring-like fragment. Below these, scattered across the surface, are dozens of irregularly shaped shards and pieces of varying sizes, some appearing flat, others with texture or layered composition. A vertical red stamp on the right edge reads "ENCLOSURE".

elements.description: A black and white photograph showing numerous physical specimens laid out on a flat surface. The specimens include five distinct dark mechanical or metal components in the top row (a circular disc, a spool, a rectangular object, and a C-shaped ring), and dozens of fragments of varying sizes scattered below them. The fragments appear to be pieces of material, some with dark, textured surfaces and others lighter and smoother, resembling broken rock or debris. Handwritten text at the top reads "'FLYING SAUCER', ALLEGED SPECIMENS." The number "233138" is stamped at the top right, with "CONFIDENTIAL" stamped below it. A handwritten "5" is at the top right corner. A small red label on the right edge reads "ENCLOSURE".

judge.reason: Description B invents specific text ('FLYING SAUCER', '233138', 'CONFIDENTIAL', '5') that is not mentioned in Description A, creating contradictions about quoted verbatim content.
